'''Bômlas''' was an infamous [[Ychthytonian]] bartender on [[Skip 1]]. He lost one of his four arms in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game, but, according to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], the loss did not slow Bômlas down by much.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
